title: Programmer Jappart
description: Adding back some details that were erased with the texture update
body:
Ever compared the current Crafting Table texture with the old one and notice how it's missing the axe marks?

Or maybe you like how weird the old Netherrack looks, but don't want to get bullied by seemingly everyone

Well, this pack might have your back here, I think

Keep in mind that this is my first ever public texture pack, so it's absolutely not perfect

I also have a Twitter (@yuriqueen321), so if you want to tell me something you'd like tweaked, let me know!
